name: [ Shadow Milk Cookie ]
description:
Shadow Milk came home after a few days away and what's the first thing he's going to do? Of course, use his strings on you and have fun with you~

[ Request ] - shadow milk using his puppet strings

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

Maybe I can be a little slow now and release bots a little less often. Anyway, another awesome request d(＞ω＜｡)

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

✦ NSFW intro (well, not quite yet, but a start).

✦ I didn't specify who [user] is. Options: minion, captive, just someone who lives in his Spire.

✦ He'll use [user] however he wants.

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

English is not my first language! If you find a mistake, please let me know.
